title: Grafana Annotation Creation Rate, Deployment-Marker Storms, and Dashboard Timeline-Pollution Detection for Incident-Forensics Reliability
exclusions: Does not replace UC-13.6.1 dashboard performance, UC-13.6.2 datasource query errors, UC-13.6.3 alerting scheduler duration, UC-13.6.4 plugin governance, UC-13.6.5 authentication and session analytics, or UC-13.6.13 notifier delivery tracing; does not mutate Grafana annotations automatically; human-approved cleanup and token rotation remain operator actions.
evidence: Saved search observability_uc_13_6_6_grafana_annotation_timeline_governance with five-to-fifteen minute schedule; drilldown dashboards on grafana_instance and dashboardUID; weekly CSV exports of alert results to a restricted evidence index.

controlTest.positiveScenario: In lab, configure an automation user to POST duplicate deployment markers with identical tags and text for several minutes while access logs show rising 4xx rates from an intentionally expired token on a parallel job; confirm observability_uc_13_6_6_grafana_annotation_timeline_governance returns high severity with non-null recommended_action within fifteen minutes.
controlTest.negativeScenario: After restoring valid tokens, stopping duplicate posts, and aligning database exports with live dashboards, confirm sustained low severity for thirty consecutive scheduled runs and zero high rows in the alert wrapper when filtering to production org identifiers only.

dataSources: `index=grafana` or `index=observability` with `sourcetype=grafana:access` or `sourcetype=grafana:http_access` for `/api/annotations` POST GET PUT PATCH DELETE including `httpStatus`, `method`, `org_id`, `userId`, and `dashboardUID` when extracted; `index=metrics` or `prometheus_metrics` with `sourcetype=prometheus:metrics` for `api_response_status_total` and annotation route labels; `index=grafana` or `index=databases` with `sourcetype=postgres:grafana_annotations`, `sourcetype=mysql:grafana_annotations`, or `sourcetype=grafana:sql:annotations` mirroring `grafana_annotations` table fields including `dashboardId`, `panelId`, `alertId`, `tags`, `text`, `created`, `userId`, `apiVersion`; `index=itsi_summary` or `index=platform` with `sourcetype=itsi:annotation_correlation` or `sourcetype=itsi:notable:annotation` for deploy-window correlation gaps; lookups `grafana_dashboard_inventory.csv` and `grafana_annotation_publishers.csv`; ingest via Splunk Universal Forwarder or `splunk_otel_collector` log pipelines.
app: Grafana OSS Enterprise Cloud with Splunk Universal Forwarder or Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector log and metrics pipelines
spl:
`comment("UC-13.6.6 Grafana annotations deployment-marker storms timeline pollution duplicates orphans tag-cardinality api 4xx5xx auth-fail deploy-gap ITSI correlation earliest=-4h@h bucket=5m")`
| multisearch
    [ search (index=grafana OR index=observability OR index=platform) (sourcetype=grafana:access OR sourcetype=grafana:http_access) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval uri=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(uri,request_uri,url_path,path,""))))
      | where like(uri,"%/api/annotations%")
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,host,splunk_server,"unknown_grafana"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,org,"0")))
      | eval httpStatus=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(status,http_status,status_code,"200"))),10)
      | eval method=upper(trim(toString(coalesce(http_method,method,request_method,"GET"))))
      | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,dashboardUid,dashboard_uid,"access_unknown")))
      | eval panelId=trim(toString(coalesce(panelId,panel_id,"0")))
      | eval alertId=trim(toString(coalesce(alertId,alert_id,"0")))
      | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,user_id,remote_user,user,"http_actor")))
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(tags,tag_list,query_tags,"")))
      | eval text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(text,message,method,""))),1,420)
      | eval ann_time=if(len(trim(toString(coalesce(annotation_time,time_iso,""))))>12,strptime(trim(toString(coalesce(annotation_time,time_iso,""))),"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),null())
      | eval ann_time_end=if(len(trim(toString(coalesce(time_end_iso,timeEnd,""))))>12,strptime(trim(toString(coalesce(time_end_iso,timeEnd,""))),"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),null())
      | eval created=coalesce(ann_time,_time)
      | eval apiVersion=trim(toString(coalesce(apiVersion,api_version,"http")))
      | eval dashboardId=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardId,dashboard_id,"0")))
      | eval lane="access_api_annotations"
      | eval api_hit=if(method=="POST" OR method=="PUT" OR method=="PATCH",2,1)
      | eval api_err=if(httpStatus>=400,1,0)
      | eval auth_fail=if(httpStatus==401 OR httpStatus==403,1,0)
      | eval orphan_hint=0
      | eval tag_card_blow=0
      | eval deploy_gap=0
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
    [ search (index=metrics OR index=prometheus_metrics OR index=observability_metrics) (sourcetype=prometheus:metrics OR sourcetype=prometheus:grafana OR sourcetype=prometheus:otel) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,name,""))))
      | where like(mn,"%api_response_status_total%")
      | eval route_l=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(route,handler,path,exported_path,""))))
      | where like(route_l,"%annotation%") OR like(mn,"%annotation%") OR like(route_l,"%/api/annotations%")
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,host,pod,job,"metrics_grafana"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,orgId,"0")))
      | eval httpStatus=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(status,code,status_code,le,"200"))),10)
      | eval dashboardUID="api_metrics_lane"
      | eval panelId="0"
      | eval alertId="0"
      | eval userId="prometheus_scrape"
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(method,http_method,"metric")))
      | eval text=mn." route=".route_l
      | eval ann_time=null()
      | eval ann_time_end=null()
      | eval created=_time
      | eval apiVersion="metrics"
      | eval dashboardId="0"
      | eval lane="metrics_api_response_status_total"
      | eval mv=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(value,metric_value,"0"))),10)
      | eval api_hit=mv
      | eval api_err=if(httpStatus>=400,mv,0)
      | eval auth_fail=if(httpStatus==401 OR httpStatus==403,mv,0)
      | eval orphan_hint=0
      | eval tag_card_blow=0
      | eval deploy_gap=0
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
    [ search (index=grafana OR index=databases OR index=platform) (sourcetype=grafana:sql:annotations OR sourcetype=postgres:grafana_annotations OR sourcetype=mysql:grafana_annotations) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,cluster,host,"db_grafana"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,orgId,"0")))
      | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,dashboard_uid,dashboardUid,"db_unknown")))
      | eval dashboardId=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardId,dashboard_id,"0")))
      | eval panelId=trim(toString(coalesce(panelId,panel_id,"0")))
      | eval alertId=trim(toString(coalesce(alertId,alert_id,"0")))
      | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,user_id,"db_user")))
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(tags,tag,"")))
      | eval text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(text,data,""))),1,420)
      | eval epoch_ms=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(created_ms,epoch_ms,time_ms,"0"))),10)
      | eval created=if(epoch_ms>1000000000000,epoch_ms/1000,if(epoch_ms>1000000000,epoch_ms,_time))
      | eval ann_time=created
      | eval ann_time_end=null()
      | eval httpStatus=200
      | eval apiVersion=trim(toString(coalesce(apiVersion,api_version,"sql")))
      | eval lane="db_grafana_annotations_table"
      | eval api_hit=1
      | eval api_err=0
      | eval auth_fail=0
      | eval orphan_hint=if(match(lower(dashboardUID),"deleted|orphan|unknown|null") OR (dashboardId=="0" AND match(lower(text),"removed|deleted dashboard")),1,0)
      | eval tag_card_blow=if(len(tags)>480 OR (match(lower(tags),"build_id|git_sha|image_digest|commit=") AND mvcount(split(tags,","))>24),1,0)
      | eval deploy_gap=0
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
    [ search (index=itsi_summary OR index=itsi_grouped_alerts OR index=platform) (sourcetype=itsi:annotation_correlation OR sourcetype=itsi:notable:annotation) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(grafana_instance,entity_key,host,"itsi_bridge"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,"0")))
      | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,dashboard_uid,"itsi_correlation")))
      | eval dashboardId=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardId,"0")))
      | eval panelId=trim(toString(coalesce(panelId,"0")))
      | eval alertId=trim(toString(coalesce(alertId,episode_id,"0")))
      | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,"itsi_service")))
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(tags,episode_tags,"itsi")))
      | eval text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(text,description,episode_title,""))),1,420)
      | eval created=_time
      | eval ann_time=_time
      | eval ann_time_end=null()
      | eval httpStatus=200
      | eval apiVersion="itsi"
      | eval lane="itsi_annotation_correlation_index"
      | eval api_hit=1
      | eval api_err=0
      | eval auth_fail=0
      | eval orphan_hint=0
      | eval tag_card_blow=0
      | eval deploy_gap=if(match(lower(text),"missing_deploy_marker|annotation_gap|silent_deploy_window"),1,0)
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
| eval dashboardUID=coalesce(nullif(trim(dashboardUID),""),"unknown_uid")
| eval userId=coalesce(nullif(trim(userId),""),"unknown_user")
| eval _time=coalesce(_time,ann_time,created)
| stats sum(api_hit) AS anno_hits sum(api_err) AS api_errors sum(auth_fail) AS auth_errors max(orphan_hint) AS orphan_flag max(tag_card_blow) AS tag_card_flag max(deploy_gap) AS deploy_gap_flag values(lane) AS lanes values(panelId) AS panelId values(alertId) AS alertId values(tags) AS tags values(text) AS text values(apiVersion) AS apiVersion latest(httpStatus) AS httpStatus values(dashboardId) AS dashboardId latest(ann_time) AS time latest(ann_time_end) AS timeEnd latest(created) AS created BY _time grafana_instance org_id dashboardUID userId
| sort grafana_instance dashboardUID userId - _time
| streamstats window=6 current=f global=f avg(anno_hits) AS rolling_mean BY grafana_instance dashboardUID userId
| streamstats window=3 current=t global=f sum(anno_hits) AS sum3 BY grafana_instance dashboardUID userId
| eventstats median(anno_hits) AS inst_med BY grafana_instance
| eval dup_window_hits=if(sum3>=(4*coalesce(rolling_mean,0)) AND sum3>20,sum3,0)
| eval anno_rate_5m=anno_hits
| join type=left max=0 dashboardUID [| inputlookup grafana_dashboard_inventory.csv | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,uid,""))) | fields dashboardUID dashboard_title owner_team business_priority]
| join type=left max=0 userId [| inputlookup grafana_annotation_publishers.csv | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,publisher_id,service_account,""))) | fields userId publisher_team ci_allowed rotate_token_after]
| eval publisher_team=coalesce(publisher_team,"unlisted_publisher")
| eval dashboard_title=coalesce(dashboard_title,dashboardUID)
| eval owner_team=coalesce(owner_team,"unassigned")
| eval merge_key=1
| join type=left max=0 merge_key [| tstats summariesonly=t count AS change_correlations FROM datamodel=Change WHERE nodename=Change earliest=-4h@h latest=now | eval merge_key=1 | fields merge_key change_correlations]
| eval change_correlations=coalesce(change_correlations,0)
| eval severity=case(
    orphan_flag>=1,"high",
    tag_card_flag>=1,"high",
    api_errors>=25,"high",
    auth_errors>=8,"high",
    dup_window_hits>=60,"high",
    anno_rate_5m>=(inst_med*5) AND anno_rate_5m>35,"medium",
    deploy_gap_flag>=1,"medium",
    anno_rate_5m>=(inst_med*3) AND anno_rate_5m>18,"medium",
    true(),"low")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    orphan_flag>=1,"reconcile_annotation_rows_with_live_dashboard_uids_purge_stale_panel_references",
    tag_card_flag>=1,"replace_per_build_annotation_tags_with_release_train_labels_cap_mvcount",
    api_errors>=25,"tune_grafana_http_workers_db_connections_review_proxy_limits_for_/api/annotations",
    auth_errors>=8,"rotate_ci_and_automation_tokens_revalidate_service_account_roles",
    dup_window_hits>=60,"add_idempotency_to_deploy_scripts_stop_duplicate_post_storms",
    deploy_gap_flag>=1,"repair_webhook_or_pipeline_posting_annotations_inside_deploy_windows",
    true(),"refresh_baselines_and_annotation_publisher_allowlist")
| table _time grafana_instance org_id dashboardUID dashboardId panelId alertId tags text time timeEnd userId created apiVersion httpStatus anno_rate_5m dup_window_hits orphan_flag tag_card_flag api_errors auth_errors deploy_gap_flag change_correlations dashboard_title publisher_team owner_team severity recommended_action
description: Detects Grafana annotation timeline reliability risks by correlating reverse-proxy access storms on /api/annotations, Prometheus api_response_status_total series aimed at annotation routes, SQL-backed grafana_annotations exports for orphan rows and tag-cardinality blow-ups, and optional Splunk ITSI annotation correlation gaps, then scoring per-dashboardUID creation bursts against rolling baselines, duplicate short-window posting patterns, automation authentication failures, HTTP 4xx and 5xx saturation, and missing expected deploy markers during change windows so incident responders retain deployment-to-outage correlation.
value: Platform and SRE leaders keep executive and service dashboards readable during incidents, while audit and change stakeholders retain credible evidence that deployment markers, rollback points, and manual checkpoints actually appeared on the right timelines instead of drowning operators in automation noise or vanishing when tokens and APIs misbehave.
implementation: Land grafana:access and grafana:http_access with /api/annotations paths, prometheus:metrics scrapes carrying api_response_status_total, SQL or CDC exports of grafana_annotations, optional itsi:annotation_correlation events, publish grafana_dashboard_inventory.csv and grafana_annotation_publishers.csv, save observability_uc_13_6_6_grafana_annotation_timeline_governance on five-to-fifteen-minute cadence with earliest=-4h@h, route high and medium severities to platform observability on-call, archive weekly CSV exports to a restricted index.
visualization: Severity-colored table by grafana_instance and dashboardUID with drilldowns to grafana:access lines, prometheus metric samples, SQL annotation exports, ITSI correlation rows, and inventory joins; sparklines for anno_rate_5m; highlight orphan_flag and tag_card_flag.
cimSpl:
| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Change.object) AS chg_object latest(Change.action) AS chg_action count FROM datamodel=Change WHERE nodename=Change earliest=-4h@h latest=now BY Change.user Change.dest
| rename Change.user AS userId Change.dest AS grafana_host
| where like(lower(chg_object), "%annotation%") OR like(lower(chg_object), "%deploy%")
| table userId grafana_host chg_object chg_action count
dataModelAcceleration: Accelerate Splunk CIM Change summaries when Grafana annotation publisher or dashboard lifecycle events map into Change.object and Change.user; retain thirty days for quarterly configuration attestations.

references.title: Splunk Docs — Use OTel with Splunk Platform

knownFalsePositives: Approved fleet-wide deploy weekends and blue-green promotion windows can multiply legitimate markers for thirty to sixty minutes; require change_ticket_id correlation before paging application teams. Rollback floods during active incidents may spike anno_rate_5m and dup_window_hits while still being the correct operational story; pair with incident metadata and commander approval before muting. Integration and chaos tests that post synthetic annotations into staging orgs will trip rate heuristics unless non-production indexes or lookup flags downgrade severity. Read-heavy monitoring that polls annotation APIs for health checks elevates GET volume without implying writer storms; segment methods in investigations. Grafana Cloud maintenance may shift metric labels or sampling; compare vendor status before internal blame. Database replication lag between primary and analytics replicas can delay orphan detection until exports catch up; widen tolerance or read from primary for break-glass slices. Inventory CSV staleness after GitOps renames makes healthy dashboards look orphaned until the lookup refreshes; automate weekly sync. ITSI correlation lanes that lack episode traffic in dev will appear quiet while production shows storms; validate lane routing per environment. Executive dashboards with dense alert rule annotations can resemble automation spam; use business_priority from inventory to tune thresholds without silencing critical boards.

premiumApps.name: Splunk ITSI
premiumApps.note: optional — ITSI annotation correlation lane and episode alignment to dashboardUID markers

detailedImplementation:
Step 1 — Prerequisites

Head of Platform owns this control jointly with observability platform engineers who operate Grafana OSS, Grafana Enterprise, and Grafana Cloud stacks, the teams that own continuous delivery pipelines posting deployment markers, database administrators who host Grafana SQL backends on PostgreSQL or MySQL, and Splunk operators who land reverse-proxy access logs, Prometheus scrapes, database change-data-capture streams, and optional Splunk IT Service Intelligence correlation indexes. This use case is deliberately not UC-13.6.1 dashboard render-time analytics, not UC-13.6.2 datasource query error forensics, not UC-13.6.3 unified alerting evaluation duration, not UC-13.6.4 plugin install skew, not UC-13.6.5 login and session abuse narratives, and not UC-13.6.13 notification channel delivery tracing. Here the subject is Grafana annotations themselves: time-bound markers and regions posted through the HTTP API, provisioning hooks, alert rule annotations, and manual UI actions that appear on dashboard timelines for incident correlation.

Annotations differ from alerts because they do not route through contact points; they paint context on graphs. When automation posts thousands of near-identical deployment markers after a flaky canary job, timelines become solid bands of noise and human operators cannot see which deploy preceded a regression. When CI uses unique build identifiers as annotation tags for every merge, tag cardinality explodes, slowing annotation queries and bloating the backing table. When dashboards are deleted but rows remain in the annotation table, orphan references confuse forensic joins. When service tokens expire, POST /api/annotations returns 401 clusters that look like attacks yet are operational debt. When Grafana internal metrics show rising api_response_status_total counters for /api/annotations paired with 502 responses, the control plane is choking even if individual panels still render. When ITSI or change-management bridges expect a deploy marker inside a maintenance window and none arrives, downstream correlation silently weakens.

Grafana persists annotations in the SQL store for most self-managed installs; the grafana_annotations table carries dashboard_id, panel_id, epoch timestamps, tags, text, user identifiers, and optional alert identifiers depending on version. Cloud offerings expose the same conceptual model through vendor APIs yet your Splunk path may be audit exports rather than direct database taps. The public HTTP API documents create, update, delete, and mass-query routes under /api/annotations with fields such as dashboardUID, time, timeEnd, tags, text, and panelId for scoped markers. Enterprise audit logs record privileged mutations when enabled, complementing nginx or Envoy access lines that show method, status, and latency per request.

RBAC matters because annotation writers are often automation accounts with long-lived tokens. Inventory those publishers in grafana_annotation_publishers.csv with owner_team, ci_allowed boolean, and rotate_token_after guidance. Pair with grafana_dashboard_inventory.csv for dashboard_uid to owner_team and business_priority so severity routes land with accountable teams rather than a generic platform queue. Legal and privacy reviews should approve retention for annotation text, which may embed change tickets, commit messages, or internal service names.

Risk briefing: legitimate blue-green deploys can intentionally post dense markers for a short interval; baseline-relative thresholds reduce false paging. Canary pipelines that restart frequently may still be correct behavior; compare against change_ticket_id metadata when available. Grafana annotation queries from heavily used executive dashboards can inflate GET /api/annotations volume without any misconfiguration; separate read storms from write storms using HTTP method in access logs.

Differentiation recap: annotation creation rate per dashboardUID, duplicate or near-duplicate tag and text bursts, orphan rows after dashboard lifecycle events, tag-cardinality governance, API authentication failures from automation, HTTP error saturation on annotation routes, silent loss of expected markers during deploy windows correlated against ITSI or change feeds, and Prometheus-style api_response_status_total signals for annotation paths—not login abuse, not panel query failures, not plugin versioning, and not notifier delivery.

Collector posture: stamp change_ticket_id on forwarded events when annotation publisher software or token scopes change. Use Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector or Universal Forwarder agents with explicit allowlists for database CDC topics so non-Grafana tables never leak into this index. Clock skew between proxies and Grafana pods widens apparent duplicate windows; monitor NTP elsewhere.

Field normalization expectations: coalesce dashboardUID versus dashboard_uid versus uid fragments from exporters. Map httpStatus from status_code on proxies. Preserve userId for joins to publisher allowlists. Retain apiVersion when clients declare Grafana API revisions. For database dumps, convert created millisecond epochs to seconds consistently before comparing to _time.

Step 2 — Configure data collection

Stand up four complementary lanes the multisearch stanza fans in parallel, plus two CSV knowledge objects and optional ITSI correlation ingest.

Lane A lands reverse-proxy or Grafana access logs with sourcetype=grafana:access or sourcetype=grafana:http_access into index=grafana or index=observability. Ensure URI paths retain /api/annotations for POST, GET, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE. Extract method, httpStatus, dashboardUID when present in query parameters or JSON request bodies if your pipeline parses bodies under policy. When body parsing is disallowed, rely on response size and status families paired with database lane confirmation. Preserve org_id, userId or service account names, and upstream duration when available.

Lane B scrapes Grafana Prometheus /metrics from OSS, Enterprise, or Cloud agent exporters into index=metrics or prometheus_metrics with sourcetype=prometheus:metrics. Retain series matching api_response_status_total and any label that identifies route, handler, or path so you can isolate annotation endpoints from unrelated API traffic. Relabel rules should keep instance or pod identity mapping to grafana_instance used elsewhere.

Lane C streams periodic exports or change-data-capture from the grafana_annotations table on PostgreSQL or MySQL into index=grafana or index=databases with sourcetype=postgres:grafana_annotations or sourcetype=mysql:grafana_annotations or a consolidated sourcetype=grafana:sql:annotations. Include dashboardId, panelId, alertId, tags, text, created epoch, userId, and apiVersion if your export includes it. Mask or hash sensitive free-text if policy requires, while keeping enough structure for duplicate detection.

Lane D lands ITSI or platform correlation events into index=itsi_summary, index=itsi_grouped_alerts, or index=platform with sourcetype=itsi:annotation_correlation or sourcetype=itsi:notable:annotation that explicitly encodes missing deploy markers, silent deploy windows, or episode-to-annotation bridges. This lane is optional yet valuable when change processes expect Splunk ITSI episodes to align with Grafana timelines.

Knowledge object one maintains lookups/grafana_dashboard_inventory.csv with dashboard_uid, dashboard_title, owner_team, business_priority, and last_reviewed refreshed from Grafana HTTP API exports or GitOps registries.

Knowledge object two maintains lookups/grafana_annotation_publishers.csv with userId or service account identifiers, publisher_team, ci_allowed, rotate_token_after, and notes for break-glass automation.

Example curl helpers after authenticating with a scoped key:

```bash
curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $GRAFANA_TOKEN" "https://grafana.example.org/api/annotations?limit=10"
curl -fsS https://grafana.example.org/metrics | rg -n "api_response_status_total"
```

Pre-save validation: confirm each sourcetype produces events within one hour, that a lab POST to /api/annotations increments the access lane and database lane within expected replication delay, and that intentional 401 from an expired token surfaces auth_fail counters without routing to UC-13.6.5 narratives.

Dashboards: host a severity-colored table by grafana_instance and dashboardUID with drilldowns to raw access lines, prometheus samples, SQL export rows, and ITSI correlation events.

Step 3 — Create the search and alert

Save the SPL as observability_uc_13_6_6_grafana_annotation_timeline_governance with a five or fifteen minute schedule during steady production, dispatch.earliest_time=-4h@h, dispatch.latest_time=now, and alert when severity is high or medium per local policy. Throttle duplicate grafana_instance, dashboardUID, and userId triples for thirty minutes unless severity escalates. Include recommended_action, anno_rate_5m, and dup_window_hits in pager narratives so incident responders open annotation publisher runbooks instead of generic Grafana home pages.

Pipeline narrative: multisearch fans HTTP access for /api/annotations, Prometheus api_response_status_total lanes filtered toward annotation routes, SQL-backed grafana_annotations exports, and ITSI annotation correlation indexes so a silent single lane cannot hide a genuine deploy-marker storm. After union, coalesce() harmonizes dashboardUID, userId, and timing fields across naming drift. stats buckets per five minute _time and key dimensions, then streamstats computes short rolling averages and burst sums per dashboard and publisher to approximate duplicate-posting storms. eventstats adds per-instance median baselines for adaptive thresholds. join with inputlookup enriches dashboard and publisher ownership. A final join carries tstats counts from the accelerated Change data model as optional cross-check volume for change correlation hygiene—not as a sole source of truth for annotations. case() maps orphan hints, tag cardinality blow-ups, API and auth error density, burst multiples, deploy gap flags, and baseline-relative rates into severity tiers.

Fenced SPL must match the top-level spl JSON field exactly:

```spl
`comment("UC-13.6.6 Grafana annotations deployment-marker storms timeline pollution duplicates orphans tag-cardinality api 4xx5xx auth-fail deploy-gap ITSI correlation earliest=-4h@h bucket=5m")`
| multisearch
    [ search (index=grafana OR index=observability OR index=platform) (sourcetype=grafana:access OR sourcetype=grafana:http_access) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval uri=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(uri,request_uri,url_path,path,""))))
      | where like(uri,"%/api/annotations%")
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,host,splunk_server,"unknown_grafana"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,org,"0")))
      | eval httpStatus=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(status,http_status,status_code,"200"))),10)
      | eval method=upper(trim(toString(coalesce(http_method,method,request_method,"GET"))))
      | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,dashboardUid,dashboard_uid,"access_unknown")))
      | eval panelId=trim(toString(coalesce(panelId,panel_id,"0")))
      | eval alertId=trim(toString(coalesce(alertId,alert_id,"0")))
      | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,user_id,remote_user,user,"http_actor")))
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(tags,tag_list,query_tags,"")))
      | eval text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(text,message,method,""))),1,420)
      | eval ann_time=if(len(trim(toString(coalesce(annotation_time,time_iso,""))))>12,strptime(trim(toString(coalesce(annotation_time,time_iso,""))),"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),null())
      | eval ann_time_end=if(len(trim(toString(coalesce(time_end_iso,timeEnd,""))))>12,strptime(trim(toString(coalesce(time_end_iso,timeEnd,""))),"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),null())
      | eval created=coalesce(ann_time,_time)
      | eval apiVersion=trim(toString(coalesce(apiVersion,api_version,"http")))
      | eval dashboardId=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardId,dashboard_id,"0")))
      | eval lane="access_api_annotations"
      | eval api_hit=if(method=="POST" OR method=="PUT" OR method=="PATCH",2,1)
      | eval api_err=if(httpStatus>=400,1,0)
      | eval auth_fail=if(httpStatus==401 OR httpStatus==403,1,0)
      | eval orphan_hint=0
      | eval tag_card_blow=0
      | eval deploy_gap=0
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
    [ search (index=metrics OR index=prometheus_metrics OR index=observability_metrics) (sourcetype=prometheus:metrics OR sourcetype=prometheus:grafana OR sourcetype=prometheus:otel) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,name,""))))
      | where like(mn,"%api_response_status_total%")
      | eval route_l=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(route,handler,path,exported_path,""))))
      | where like(route_l,"%annotation%") OR like(mn,"%annotation%") OR like(route_l,"%/api/annotations%")
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,host,pod,job,"metrics_grafana"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,orgId,"0")))
      | eval httpStatus=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(status,code,status_code,le,"200"))),10)
      | eval dashboardUID="api_metrics_lane"
      | eval panelId="0"
      | eval alertId="0"
      | eval userId="prometheus_scrape"
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(method,http_method,"metric")))
      | eval text=strcat(mn," route=",route_l)
      | eval ann_time=null()
      | eval ann_time_end=null()
      | eval created=_time
      | eval apiVersion="metrics"
      | eval dashboardId="0"
      | eval lane="metrics_api_response_status_total"
      | eval mv=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(value,metric_value,"0"))),10)
      | eval api_hit=mv
      | eval api_err=if(httpStatus>=400,mv,0)
      | eval auth_fail=if(httpStatus==401 OR httpStatus==403,mv,0)
      | eval orphan_hint=0
      | eval tag_card_blow=0
      | eval deploy_gap=0
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
    [ search (index=grafana OR index=databases OR index=platform) (sourcetype=grafana:sql:annotations OR sourcetype=postgres:grafana_annotations OR sourcetype=mysql:grafana_annotations) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(instance,cluster,host,"db_grafana"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,orgId,"0")))
      | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,dashboard_uid,dashboardUid,"db_unknown")))
      | eval dashboardId=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardId,dashboard_id,"0")))
      | eval panelId=trim(toString(coalesce(panelId,panel_id,"0")))
      | eval alertId=trim(toString(coalesce(alertId,alert_id,"0")))
      | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,user_id,"db_user")))
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(tags,tag,"")))
      | eval text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(text,data,""))),1,420)
      | eval epoch_ms=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(created_ms,epoch_ms,time_ms,"0"))),10)
      | eval created=if(epoch_ms>1000000000000,epoch_ms/1000,if(epoch_ms>1000000000,epoch_ms,_time))
      | eval ann_time=created
      | eval ann_time_end=null()
      | eval httpStatus=200
      | eval apiVersion=trim(toString(coalesce(apiVersion,api_version,"sql")))
      | eval lane="db_grafana_annotations_table"
      | eval api_hit=1
      | eval api_err=0
      | eval auth_fail=0
      | eval orphan_hint=if(match(lower(dashboardUID),"deleted|orphan|unknown|null") OR (dashboardId=="0" AND match(lower(text),"removed|deleted dashboard")),1,0)
      | eval tag_card_blow=if(len(tags)>480 OR (match(lower(tags),"build_id|git_sha|image_digest|commit=") AND mvcount(split(tags,","))>24),1,0)
      | eval deploy_gap=0
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
    [ search (index=itsi_summary OR index=itsi_grouped_alerts OR index=platform) (sourcetype=itsi:annotation_correlation OR sourcetype=itsi:notable:annotation) earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval grafana_instance=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(grafana_instance,entity_key,host,"itsi_bridge"))))
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,"0")))
      | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,dashboard_uid,"itsi_correlation")))
      | eval dashboardId=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardId,"0")))
      | eval panelId=trim(toString(coalesce(panelId,"0")))
      | eval alertId=trim(toString(coalesce(alertId,episode_id,"0")))
      | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,"itsi_service")))
      | eval tags=trim(toString(coalesce(tags,episode_tags,"itsi")))
      | eval text=substr(trim(toString(coalesce(text,description,episode_title,""))),1,420)
      | eval created=_time
      | eval ann_time=_time
      | eval ann_time_end=null()
      | eval httpStatus=200
      | eval apiVersion="itsi"
      | eval lane="itsi_annotation_correlation_index"
      | eval api_hit=1
      | eval api_err=0
      | eval auth_fail=0
      | eval orphan_hint=0
      | eval tag_card_blow=0
      | eval deploy_gap=if(match(lower(text),"missing_deploy_marker|annotation_gap|silent_deploy_window"),1,0)
      | bucket _time span=5m ]
| eval dashboardUID=coalesce(nullif(trim(dashboardUID),""),"unknown_uid")
| eval userId=coalesce(nullif(trim(userId),""),"unknown_user")
| eval _time=coalesce(_time,ann_time,created)
| stats sum(api_hit) AS anno_hits sum(api_err) AS api_errors sum(auth_fail) AS auth_errors max(orphan_hint) AS orphan_flag max(tag_card_blow) AS tag_card_flag max(deploy_gap) AS deploy_gap_flag values(lane) AS lanes values(panelId) AS panelId values(alertId) AS alertId values(tags) AS tags values(text) AS text values(apiVersion) AS apiVersion latest(httpStatus) AS httpStatus values(dashboardId) AS dashboardId latest(ann_time) AS time latest(ann_time_end) AS timeEnd latest(created) AS created BY _time grafana_instance org_id dashboardUID userId
| sort grafana_instance dashboardUID userId - _time
| streamstats window=6 current=f global=f avg(anno_hits) AS rolling_mean BY grafana_instance dashboardUID userId
| streamstats window=3 current=t global=f sum(anno_hits) AS sum3 BY grafana_instance dashboardUID userId
| eventstats median(anno_hits) AS inst_med BY grafana_instance
| eval dup_window_hits=if(sum3>=(4*coalesce(rolling_mean,0)) AND sum3>20,sum3,0)
| eval anno_rate_5m=anno_hits
| join type=left max=0 dashboardUID [| inputlookup grafana_dashboard_inventory.csv | eval dashboardUID=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboardUID,uid,""))) | fields dashboardUID dashboard_title owner_team business_priority]
| join type=left max=0 userId [| inputlookup grafana_annotation_publishers.csv | eval userId=trim(toString(coalesce(userId,publisher_id,service_account,""))) | fields userId publisher_team ci_allowed rotate_token_after]
| eval publisher_team=coalesce(publisher_team,"unlisted_publisher")
| eval dashboard_title=coalesce(dashboard_title,dashboardUID)
| eval owner_team=coalesce(owner_team,"unassigned")
| eval merge_key=1
| join type=left max=0 merge_key [| tstats summariesonly=t count AS change_correlations FROM datamodel=Change WHERE nodename=Change earliest=-4h@h latest=now | eval merge_key=1 | fields merge_key change_correlations]
| eval change_correlations=coalesce(change_correlations,0)
| eval severity=case(
    orphan_flag>=1,"high",
    tag_card_flag>=1,"high",
    api_errors>=25,"high",
    auth_errors>=8,"high",
    dup_window_hits>=60,"high",
    anno_rate_5m>=(inst_med*5) AND anno_rate_5m>35,"medium",
    deploy_gap_flag>=1,"medium",
    anno_rate_5m>=(inst_med*3) AND anno_rate_5m>18,"medium",
    true(),"low")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    orphan_flag>=1,"reconcile_annotation_rows_with_live_dashboard_uids_purge_stale_panel_references",
    tag_card_flag>=1,"replace_per_build_annotation_tags_with_release_train_labels_cap_mvcount",
    api_errors>=25,"tune_grafana_http_workers_db_connections_review_proxy_limits_for_/api/annotations",
    auth_errors>=8,"rotate_ci_and_automation_tokens_revalidate_service_account_roles",
    dup_window_hits>=60,"add_idempotency_to_deploy_scripts_stop_duplicate_post_storms",
    deploy_gap_flag>=1,"repair_webhook_or_pipeline_posting_annotations_inside_deploy_windows",
    true(),"refresh_baselines_and_annotation_publisher_allowlist")
| table _time grafana_instance org_id dashboardUID dashboardId panelId alertId tags text time timeEnd userId created apiVersion httpStatus anno_rate_5m dup_window_hits orphan_flag tag_card_flag api_errors auth_errors deploy_gap_flag change_correlations dashboard_title publisher_team owner_team severity recommended_action
```


savedsearches.conf sketch:

```ini
[observability_uc_13_6_6_grafana_annotation_timeline_governance_alert]
cron_schedule = */15 * * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -4h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
enableSched = 1
action.email = 1
action.email.to = platform-observability-oncall@example.com
action.email.subject = Grafana annotation governance $result.severity$ uid=$result.dashboardUID$
counttype = number of events
relation = greater than
quantity = 0
search = | savedsearch observability_uc_13_6_6_grafana_annotation_timeline_governance | where severity IN ("high","medium")
```

Performance: if Job Inspector shows multisearch queue time above internal targets, materialize each lane into a five-minute summary index keyed on grafana_instance, dashboardUID, and userId, widen detection windows on summaries, and retain this full search for investigations. Cap database CDC volume with filters on annotation table changes only.

Step 4 — Validate

Ground truth begins in Grafana and the SQL backend. Pick a recent annotation in the UI, note dashboardUID and timestamp, then locate matching rows in Splunk from the database lane within replication skew. Compare access log method and status for the same second from the proxy lane.

Metrics validation: query Prometheus or Splunk metrics views for api_response_status_total with annotation route labels and confirm counter deltas align with access error counts during synthetic POST failures in lab.

Duplicate storm validation: run a controlled lab script that posts identical tags and text twice per second for one minute against a non-production dashboard, confirm dup_window_hits or rate elevation within two windows, then stop the script and confirm decay.

Orphan validation: delete a lab dashboard UID and retain annotations, confirm orphan_hint elevation when inventory shows the UID as retired.

Negative test: return tokens to healthy state, restore normal posting cadence, and confirm sustained low severity for thirty consecutive runs when baselines are stable.

Runbook linkage: document expected annotation density during approved migration weekends so validators compare against maintenance calendars.

Step 5 — Operationalize & Troubleshoot

Case 1 — CI flapping reposts identical deploy markers: add idempotency keys, debounce posts on pipeline success only once per artifact digest, and dedupe on tags plus text hashes inside the publisher.

Case 2 — Runaway loop posts annotations every reconcile tick: fix the controller to watch Generation or ResourceVersion, backoff on error, and cap per-minute writes with a circuit breaker.

Case 3 — Per-build-id tags explode cardinality: collapse to release train and environment labels, move build identifiers into annotation text only, and enforce publisher linting in code review.

Case 4 — Orphan rows after dashboard deletion: run Grafana or SQL cleanup jobs that purge annotations whose dashboard_id no longer exists, gated by backup policy.

Case 5 — Panel-scoped annotations reference deleted panelId values: migrate annotations to dashboard scope or update panel identifiers after dashboard JSON rewrites.

Case 6 — Expired automation tokens spike 401 and 403 on POST /api/rotate service account keys, refresh vault secrets, and update grafana_annotation_publishers.csv rotate_token_after discipline.

Case 7 — Reverse proxy returns 502 while Grafana metrics show healthy goroutines: scale ingress, raise upstream timeouts for large annotation queries, and split read-heavy dashboards from write automation paths.

Case 8 — GET storms from scripted health checks masquerade as writes: filter access lane to POST PUT PATCH when isolating publisher storms, yet retain GET for read saturation cases tied to executive dashboards.

Case 9 — ITSI reports silent deploy window while Grafana shows markers: reconcile timezone boundaries, verify correlation search uses the same org_id and dashboardUID aliases, and repair episode drilldown field mappings.

Case 10 — Database replication lag delays duplicate detection: align detection windows with replica lag service levels or prefer primary exports for forensic slices.

Case 11 — Legitimate rollback floods during incident: annotate change_ticket_id on events and suppress only with incident commander approval recorded in the ticket.

Closing checklist: five em-dash step headers are present; Step 3 fenced SPL matches the spl field exactly; multisearch lists four arms covering access, metrics, SQL annotations, and ITSI correlation; coalesce, streamstats, eventstats, case, join, inputlookup, and tstats appear; closing table includes dashboardUID, userId, httpStatus, time, timeEnd, created, apiVersion, and governance columns.

Teaching notes for junior engineers: the access lane tells you whether HTTP writers or readers are hurting reliability; the metrics lane confirms Grafana-reported status families; the database lane reveals ground truth rows including orphans; the ITSI lane connects operational change storytelling to dashboard paint.

Weekly governance: review top dashboards by anno_rate_5m and reconcile with business_priority from inventory so executive boards receive tighter publisher quotas.

Quarterly hygiene: sample annotation text for accidental secret leakage and rotate redaction rules without muting legitimate deploy context.

Stakeholder communication: frame findings as timeline readability and deploy-to-incident correlation risk, not as generic error noise.

Long-term improvement: promote stable annotation contracts in service catalogs so every service team uses the same tag keys for deploy, rollback, and feature-flag events.

Documentation: when Grafana major versions change annotation defaults, replay lab validation before trusting historical baselines.

Finally, human judgment still validates automated severity; this search guides triage rather than replacing incident commanders.
grandmaExplanation: We mark important moments on our monitoring timelines so teams can see which release lined up with a problem. When robots paint too many marks, use the wrong labels, or stop painting during deploys, the story gets messy and people lose the thread; we catch that early.
hardware: Applies to self-managed Grafana on Linux or Kubernetes with PostgreSQL or MySQL backends, Grafana Enterprise clusters, Grafana Cloud organizations, and Splunk ingest via Universal Forwarder or OpenTelemetry Collector agents.
